title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Falling Behind
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Where To Invest $10,000 Right Now?
text: This article is built around one key question: Where would you put $10,000 right now? I started by assessing the parameters of this question and presented interesting value-adding answers for my Twitter followers with additional context.

title: The Dividend Aristocrats Ranked By Quality Scores

title: Jeff Auxier's Auxier Asset Management 4th-Quarter and Full-Year 2022 Report
text: Moderating inflation, declining longer-term interest rates and a depreciating US dollar contributed to a rebound in stocks for the fourth quarter. The S&P 500 gained 7.56% for the quarter but declined 18.11% for the year, while the Auxier Focus Fund Investor shares gained 11.21% and lost 4.52% for the full year.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Aflac (AFL) Q4 Earnings

title: Aflac (AFL) Q4 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Aflac (AFL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.61% and 10.69%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Aflac Incorporated honored for performance and purpose
text: Company named to both Fortune Most Admired Companies List and Bloomberg's Gender Equality Index, showcasing commitment to providing value and equality COLUMBUS, Ga. , Feb. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Demonstrating remarkable consistency in performance and gender equality Aflac Incorporated  has been named to Fortune Magazine's list of World's Most Admired Companies for the 22nd time and Bloomberg's Gender Equality Index for the fourth consecutive year.

title: 6 Stocks Win From This Bullish Anomaly Everyone Is Talking About
text: The S&P 500 just rallied in January — following a nasty previous year. That's exactly the setup some investors are saying portends a bullish 2023 — and a handful of stocks especially thrive when it happens.
